sourcesContent:
Create New Resume

ATS-friendly resume templates that pass recruiter screening

Start with one of three MVP templates built for freshers and graduates. Free users get one created resume, one edit, and a preview flow with watermark guidance.

{{ template.category }}

{{ template.name }}

{{ template.premium ? 'Premium' : 'Free' }}

Focus on projects, skills, education, internships, certifications, and recruiter-friendly structure.

Use Template
import { Component, OnInit } from '@angular/core'; import { ResumeTemplate } from '../../../core/models/resume.model'; import { ResumeBuilderLocalService } from '../../../core/services/resume-builder-local.service'; @Component({ selector: 'app-template-list', templateUrl: './template-list.component.html' }) export class TemplateListComponent implements OnInit { templates: ResumeTemplate[] = []; loading = true; constructor(private readonly resumeBuilderLocalService: ResumeBuilderLocalService) { } ngOnInit(): void { this.templates = this.resumeBuilderLocalService.getTemplates(); this.loading = false; } }
